name: Tax Relief for Lost or Destroyed Wine

eligibility.description: Proprietors of bonded wine cellars who experience loss by theft (without negligence) or perform voluntary destruction under government supervision.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes wine from excise tax if it is lost or destroyed while in bond, provided the loss is not due to theft involving negligence/collusion or voluntary destruction without government notice.
